message:
Clippy fixes: float comparison safety, idiomatic patterns, field init

- Replace map_or(None, ...) with and_then for sigstore bundle handling
- Use f64.to_bits() for bitwise-exact float comparisons in determinism
  and veto-score assertions (avoids clippy::float_cmp)
- Replace `as f64` integer casts with safe usize_to_f64() helper that
  enforces u32 bounds before widening (eliminates lossy cast warnings)
- Use mul_add for fused multiply-add in observation builders and RNG
- Consolidate match arm for duration suffix parsing (merge "m"|"min"|"")
- Remove unnecessary .clone() on unit_path/plist_path/config_file
  (values are consumed immediately after, clone was dead weight)
- Replace field mutation after construction with struct literal init
  using ..Default::default() for PolicyConfig instances
- Rename FaultExpectation fields from expect_* to *_expected to avoid
  clippy::struct_field_names prefix-matching lint
- Add percentile_index() helper for BenchmarkStats to avoid float-based
  index computation (was: `(n as f64 * 0.95) as usize`)
- Improve next_f64() RNG to use IEEE 754 bit manipulation instead of
  lossy integer-to-float division

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
